page_numbering_note: PDF physical page (1-based, as pdfplumber indexes) = printed footer page + 2. All page fields below and in benchmark_questions.json use the PDF physical page as canonical; printed_page is the human-facing footer number.

selected_sections.name: wholesale_credit_exposure
selected_sections.rationale: Wholesale credit exposure by industry (large multi-row, multi-column table). Comparison + aggregation questions.

selected_sections.name: market_risk_var
selected_sections.rationale: Total VaR table (risk types x {Avg,Min,Max} x {2025,2024}), VaR backtesting, stress and structural interest-rate risk. Exact retrieval, row/col reading, table+text.

selected_sections.name: derivatives_note
selected_sections.rationale: Notional amount of derivative contracts (p207) and cumulative fair value hedging adjustments (p214). Exact retrieval, comparison, % and YoY arithmetic, table+footnote, hedge-accounting reasoning.
